metadata_information.title: Are Inflows of FDI Good for Russian Exporters
metadata_information.version: Python script, from D&R API, generated on 2026-03-19

title_statement.title: Are Inflows of FDI Good for Russian Exporters

document_description.abstract: This study examines whether foreign direct investment inflows facilitate upgrading of export quality in host countries. The analysis focuses on the Russian Federation and uses customs data merged with firm-level information from Orbis. The results show a positive relationship between the quality of products exported by domestic firms and the presence of foreign affiliates in the upstream (input-supplying) industries. This relationship is present irrespective of export destination or foreign direct investment origin. The results are robust to using different proxies to measure product quality.
